author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
content: Delivered: ferrum-linalg fully implemented — matrix products (dot, vdot, inner, outer, matmul, tensordot, einsum, kron, multi_dot, vecdot), decompositions (cholesky, QR, SVD, LU, eig, eigh, eigvals, eigvalsh), solvers (solve, lstsq, inv, pinv, matrix_power, tensorsolve, tensorinv), norms (norm, cond, det, slogdet, matrix_rank, trace), batched operations, faer bridge. Einsum with full parser (implicit/explicit/trace/batch/ellipsis). 73 tests passing, clippy clean.
